---
title: "International Financial Statistics - IMF"
page-layout: article
---

# International Financial Statistics - IMF

**Provider:** IMF

## Description

IMF statistical database covering international and domestic finance, monetary indicators, exchange rates, prices, production, and national accounts. Supports macroeconomic and international finance research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](http://data.imf.org/IFS)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
